creator: brad@kazrak.com
text:
xv under the given setup does not properly display images when loaded
from the Visual Schnauzer.  This problem did not show up at all under
KDE 1.x/XFree 3.3.6, and not as frequently under KDE 2.0/XFree4.0.1. 
Instead of refreshing the entire window properly, the part that was
displaying the previous image remains unchanged.  (A screenshot of
the effect is at http://www.kazrak.com/pictures/xvdump.png; it was
produced as described in the how-to-repeat section below.)

Fix: 

Unknown.
How-To-Repeat: 
Start XV with no initial image and a visual schnauzer:

xv -vsmap &

Navigate the visual schnauzer to an image larger than the default XV
image; double-click on it to display it.

This does not happen 100% of the time for me, but it probably happens
90% or more.
